data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. SLICK TEASE is progressing well and looks close to another win after hitting the frame from Box 4 last run (18.40) at this track. Has a strong record from box 1, including two wins. Top prospect. 3. DOMINEERING is better than last start when fourth (18.65) in a Grade 5 at this track over 320m. The form out of the last run is proven to be strong. Should be about the mark. 2. SPRING FRED put in a much better performance last start when in the placings at this track behind Anjo Ruby (18.55) in a Grade 5. Has the early speed to land on the pace and can stick on. Comes through a solid form race last start. Expected to feature. 4. MONTANA BANNER did a good job to finish third last time out over 320m at this track (18.77) in a Grade 5, the second top-three finish on the trot. Has good speed and will be prominent from trap eight.","runners":[1,3,2,4],"exclusive":false}

extraMarkets.name: RICHMOND-R8-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
